auth.firstBootHintBefore: First boot? Bootstrap admin email is whatever you set in
auth.sessionPasswordChange: Your password was changed on another device. Please sign in again.
auth.sessionTotpEnrolled: Two-factor authentication was enabled on another device. Please sign in again.
auth.sessionTotpDisabled: Two-factor authentication was disabled on another device. Please sign in again.
auth.sessionBackupCodesRegenerated: Your MFA backup codes were regenerated on another device. Please sign in again.
auth.sessionWebauthnRegistered: A new security key was registered on your account. Please sign in again.
auth.sessionWebauthnRemoved: A security key was removed from your account. Please sign in again.
auth.sessionRoleChange: Your account role was changed by an administrator. Please sign in again.
auth.sessionAccountDisabled: Your account was disabled by an administrator. Contact your administrator for access.
auth.sessionNotMeCascade: You flagged a new-device login as suspicious. Every session was signed out and you will be required to change your password after signing in again.
auth.sessionDefault: Your session was ended for security reasons. Please sign in again.

mfa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
mfa.hintTotp: Enter your authenticator code or a backup code
mfa.hintWebauthn: Use your security key to continue
mfa.tapKey: Tap your security key or use platform biometric to continue.
mfa.welcome: We're sending you in, {email}. Confirm it's you with one of the methods below.
mfa.lostAccess: Lost access to every method? Contact your administrator — they can disable MFA on your account so you can sign in with your password.
mfa.noChallenge: No challenge in flight. Redirecting to sign-in…
mfa.altCodeOrBackup: You can use a 6-digit authenticator code or a backup code (xxxx-xxxx).

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.intro: Enter the email associated with your account. We'll send you a link to set a new password.
forgotPassword.linkSentBody: If an account exists for {email}, we sent a password reset link. The link expires in 30 minutes — click it from the same browser to set a new password.
forgotPassword.didntGet: Didn't get it? Check your spam folder or wait a minute and request a fresh link.

signup.verifyEmailBody: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click the link in the email to activate your account, then return here to sign in.
signup.styleHint: Style: {style} — ≈{bits} bits of entropy across {chars} chars

lockout.tryAgainNow: You can try signing in again now.
lockout.securityHoldBanner: A security event triggered this hold. Resetting your password removes the hold.

globalStatus.wsl2Na: Host is not WSL2 (Linux/macOS native) — not an error
globalStatus.wsl2Off: WSL2 status unavailable — backend may be unreachable

setup.title: System needs initial setup
setup.introLine1: Welcome! This is your first time using OmniSight,
setup.introLine2: it only takes a few minutes to complete the basic configuration.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.introLine1: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been removed,

errorPage.title: An error occurred
errorPage.introLine1: An unexpected error occurred while running the system,
errorPage.introLine2: you can click the button below to retry, or go back to the home page.
